Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The main sequence is C CR DV FC CA AP P N CL But there are two possible loops one between DV and RDS and another between FC and II

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Petri nets places represent states and transitions are the activities The initial marking will have a token in the start place The final marking should have a token in the Closure place

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The first place would be before CR maybe start and the transition for CR comes next

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After DV there are two possible transitions one leading to FC if documents are okay and another leading to RDS if not The RDS transition would then go back to a place that connects again to DV

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop is after DV to RDS to after RDS to after CR to DV to after DV again

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After FC there are two transitions one to II if needed and one to CA if not
